changes.title: Bubble outline
changes.description: Message bubbles now render a colored inset border when bubbleOutlineColor and bubbleOutlineThickness are set in appearance.json. The outline uses inset box-shadow so it doesn't break layout or add to the element's bounding box. Stacks additively with bubble glow.

changes.title: Bubble glow
changes.description: Message bubbles render an outer glow via box-shadow when bubbleGlowColor and/or bubbleGlowPreset are set. Four presets: soft, strong, pulse (same intensity as soft initially), halo (1.5x spread). bubbleGlowThickness controls the spread radius (default 10px).

changes.title: Bubble animation effects
changes.description: Five CSS animation effects are available via bubbleEffect: shimmer (brightness pulse), sparkle (text-shadow flash), ripple (expanding ring on repeat), glow-breathe (filter drop-shadow breathe), holographic (gradient overlay blend). CSS keyframes are injected once on first use via _applyOnceCSS and tracked in _injectedStyleTags for lifecycle management.

changes.title: _applyBubbleDecorations + _applyOnceCSS helpers
changes.description: _applyBubbleDecorations(wrapEl, uid) resets and re-applies bubble decorations from the appearance cache. Call sites: createMessageElement (initial render for non-own messages) and _propagateAppearanceChange (real-time propagation via data-uid attribute). _applyOnceCSS(cssText, styleId) injects a style element once and tracks it in _injectedStyleTags.

changes.title: wrap.dataset.uid added to message bubbles
changes.description: The .msg bubble element now gets data-uid=m.userId to enable .msg[data-uid=x] selection in _propagateAppearanceChange. This is a non-breaking 1-character dataset addition.
